changelog: 8.3.0 — FIX: 3_Money_Flow.py — default filter include semua signal (NEUTRAL+DISTRIBUTION) agar hasil scan selalu tampil; min vol default turun ke 0.5
8.2.9 — FIX: 3_Money_Flow.py — filter_min_vol NameError saat results pertama kali muncul setelah scan
8.2.8 — FIX: 3_Money_Flow.py — enrich_top_results() dipanggil setelah scan agar Stockbit token benar-benar dipakai untuk broker data
8.2.7 — FIX: data_feed — [FD-1] orphan cache hash, [FD-2] batch round3 period, [FD-3] post-split merge corruption, [FD-4] delisted_candidates tidak persist
8.2.6 — FIX: [DF-4] delisted 2x confirm, [DF-3] weekend stale check, [SA-1] MS penalty flag, [TE-6] holding_days_est formula, [SMC-4] docstring misleading
8.2.5 — FIX: technical_engine + smc_engine — [TE-1] ATR formula di VP scoring, [TE-2] DailyEMAEngine threshold ipo/data_limited, [SMC-3] OB lookahead 1-bar → 3-bar
8.2.4 — FIX: data_feed — [DF-2] breadth formula invalid di get_ihsg_regime, [NEW-2] DataFeed daily period 60d → 1y agar EMA89 konvergen
8.2.3 — CHORE: tambah .streamlit/secrets.toml.example sebagai template API key
8.2.2 — FIX: AI Challenge — ganti model ke gemini-2.0-flash, history expander diganti tabs
8.2.1 — FIX: AI Challenge — replace form dengan screenshot+thesis workflow, support multi-upload s/d 5 gambar
8.2.0 — FEAT: Trade Journal — tambah tab AI Challenge dengan Gemini 1.5 Flash, support upload chart/bid-offer screenshot
8.1.9 — FIX: gate.py — swap MODULE 03 dan 04: Money Flow naik ke posisi kanan atas (MODULE 03), Stock Pick turun ke MODULE 04
